tasks.title: Scaffold TypeScript package
tasks.description: Create package metadata, TypeScript configuration, source entry point, and test command for the cache library.
acceptanceCriteria: Package exposes a TypeScript source entry point
Type checking and tests can be run with documented commands
tasks.suggestedAgentPrompt: Scaffold the TypeScript package for the approved cache-library spec. Do not implement cache behavior yet.

tasks.title: Implement cache core data structures
tasks.description: Implement Map-backed lookup and doubly linked recency list with injectable clock and option validation.
acceptanceCriteria: Entries can be inserted, updated, removed, and moved to most-recent position
Clock injection is available for deterministic tests
tasks.suggestedAgentPrompt: Implement the internal cache core data structures from the approved spec, including clock injection and option validation.

tasks.title: Implement public cache API
tasks.description: Expose get, set, delete, has, clear, and stats methods with TypeScript types.
acceptanceCriteria: Public methods match the approved interface list
stats reports size, hits, misses, evictions, and expirations
tasks.suggestedAgentPrompt: Implement the public TypeScript cache API from the approved spec using the existing core data structures.

tasks.title: Add deterministic TTL and LRU tests
tasks.description: Create unit tests for TTL expiry, LRU recency updates, capacity eviction, and stats counters.
acceptanceCriteria: TTL tests advance an injected clock instead of sleeping
LRU tests prove get and set move entries to most-recent position
Capacity overflow evicts the least-recent live entry
tasks.suggestedAgentPrompt: Add deterministic tests for TTL, LRU, capacity eviction, and stats according to the approved spec.
